name: Actor
description: Increase your Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 20. You have Advantage on Charisma (Deception or Performance) checks to convince others that you are a person you are disguised as. You can mimic the sounds of other creatures, including speech. A creature that hears the mimicry must succeed on a Wisdom (Insight) check (DC 8 + Charisma modifier + Proficiency Bonus) to determine the effect is faked.
